content: Release v0.2.0 checkpoint completed for GitHub: main was clean at 19cfa3b, local verification passed (npm run typecheck; npm test = 236 passing; npm run build; npm pack --dry-run = 71 files / 316.0 kB; npm publish --access public --dry-run), GitHub Pages workflow on main was already green, annotated tag v0.2.0 was pushed, and public GitHub Release was created at https://github.com/ai-org-labs/archmap/releases/tag/v0.2.0. npm registry currently has 0.1.0/0.1.1/0.1.2 only; @archmap/core@0.2.0 is not published because this environment is not authenticated to npm (npm whoami returned E401). Next human action: run npm login if needed, then npm publish --access public, then verify npm view @archmap/core@0.2.0 and jsDelivr URLs.
